prompt: Trap: ICM can punish aggression, but this spot still supports pressure.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when risk premium and stack context support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the tournament cue set, so the line uses pressure only when the read gives you a real leverage edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raising fits better when ICM pressure, fold equity, and stack context all support aggression against capped continues. A passive line wastes that leverage, while the raise converts tournament pressure into immediate folds or a cleaner value path.
